content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    11	    ;
    12	
    13	postfixExpression
    14	    :   primaryExpression
    15	    |   postfixExpression LeftParen RightParen
    16	    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	    ;
    18	
    19	unaryExpression
    20	    :   postfixExpression
    21	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    22	    ;
    23	
    24	unaryOperator
    25	    :   Plus | Minus | Exclaim
    26	    ;
    27	
    28	multiplicativeExpression
    29	    :   unaryExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) unaryExpression)*
    30	    ;
    31	
    32	additiveExpression
    33	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    34	    ;
    35	
    36	relationalExpression
    37	    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    38	    ;
    39	
    40	equalityExpression
    41	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    42	    ;
    43	
    44	logicalAndExpression
    45	    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    46	    ;
    47	
    48	logicalOrExpression
    49	    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    50	    ;
    51	
    52	assignmentExpression
    53	    :   logicalOrExpression
    54	    |   unaryExpression assignmentOperator assignmentExpression
    55	    ;
    56	
    57	assignmentOperator
    58	    :   Equal | PlusEqual | MinusEqual | StarEqual | SlashEqual | PercentEqual | 
    59	        LessLessEqual | GreaterGreaterEqual | AmpEqual | PipeEqual | CaretEqual
    60	    ;
    61	
    62	expression
    63	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    64	    ;
    65	
    66	
    67	declaration
    68	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    69	    ;
    70	
    71	declarationSpecifiers
    72	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    73	    ;
    74	
    75	declarationSpecifier
    76	    :   typeSpecifier
    77	    |   Const
    78	    ;
    79	
    80	initDeclaratorList
    81	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    82	    ;
    83	
    84	initDeclarator
    85	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    86	    ;
    87	
    88	
    89	typeSpecifier
    90	    :   Int
    91	    |   Void
    92	    |   Const
    93	    ;
    94	
    95	
    96	declarator
    97	    :   directDeclarator
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	directDeclarator
   101	    :   Identifier
   102	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
   103	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen
   104	    ;
   105	
   106	parameterTypeList
   107	    :   parameterList
   108	    ;
   109	
   110	parameterList
   111	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   112	    ;
   113	
   114	parameterDeclaration
   115	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   116	    ;
   117	
   118	identifierList
   119	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   120	    ;
   121	
   122	initializer
   123	    :   assignmentExpression
   124	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
   125	    ;
   126	
   127	initializerList
   128	    // :   designation? initializer (Comma designation? initializer)*
   129	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   130	    ;
   131	
   132	statement
   133	    :   compoundStatement
   134	    |   expressionStatement
   135	    |   selectionStatement
   136	    |   iterationStatement
   137	    |   jumpStatement
   138	    ;
   139	
   140	compoundStatement
   141	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   142	    ;
   143	
   144	blockItemList
   145	    :   blockItem+
   146	    ;
   147	
   148	blockItem
   149	    :   statement
   150	    |   declaration
   151	    ;
   152	
   153	expressionStatement
   154	    :   expression? Semi
   155	    ;
   156	
   157	selectionStatement
   158	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   159	    ;
   160	
   161	iterationStatement
   162	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   163	    ;
   164	
   165	jumpStatement
   166	    :   (Return expression?)
   167	    |   (Break | Continue)
   168	    Semi
   169	    ;
   170	
   171	compilationUnit
   172	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   173	    ;
   174	
   175	translationUnit
   176	    :   externalDeclaration+
   177	    ;
   178	
   179	externalDeclaration
   180	    :   functionDefinition
   181	    |   declaration
   182	    ;
   183	
   184	functionDefinition
   185	    :   declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator compoundStatement
   186	    ;
   187	
   188	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
